---
title: "Proyecto"
subtitle: "Poner el tema cuando ya este definido"
author: "Francini Cervantes, Yelena Hernandez, David Sabater"
date: "`r format(Sys.Date(), '%d de %B de %Y')`"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_float: true
    number_sections: true
    theme: flatly
    highlight: tango
---

```{r setup, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)

#Librerias

library(shiny)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(lubridate)
library(magrittr)
library(ggplot2)
 library(tidyverse)
library(readxl)
library(openxlsx)



```




# Carga de las base de datos 

```{r }
# Base_ICC <- read_xlsx("Bases/Base del ICC 2022-2023_vf.xls")
Base_ICC_2022_2023 <- read.xlsx("Base del ICC 2022-2023_vf.xlsx")
Base_ICC_2023_2024 <- read.xlsx("Base ICC 2023_2024.xlsx", sheet = "Datos")
Base_Universidad <- read.xlsx("bd_matricula_sector_estatal_2021_2025.xlsx")


```

```{r

```
